hypotheses.statement: Whole-chart Huyền Khí is exactly the rounded sum of twelve palace scores.
Palace scores contain a coarse quarter-step base plus fine residual modifiers.
hypotheses.currentEvidence: 170/207 observed nonzero scores fall on a 0.25 grid.
hypotheses.nextTest: Cluster residuals by star state, void, transformations and Cục relations.

hypotheses.statement: Mệnh/Cục and palace branch establish the coarse base score.
hypotheses.nextTest: Controlled same-date 12-hour sets and same-star-configuration contrasts.

hypotheses.statement: Tuần/Triệt and Tứ Hóa produce fine residual adjustments.
hypotheses.nextTest: Matched pairs differing only in void or transformation target.

hypotheses.statement: Đẩu Minh or Xí Hoa can be used directly as Huyền Khí.
A generic support-minus-pressure star sum is Huyền Khí.
hypotheses.reason: It does not follow the published conceptual definition and has failed annual-axis calibration.
